top_signals.title: Homebuyers Hammered as War-Fueled Bond Rout Drives Up Rates (1)
top_signals.summary: Najimah Roberson, a lifelong renter, spent the past two years searching around Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, for a home she could afford — getting outbid nearly 30 times along the way.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Xi and Putin pledge closer cooperation on AI, cyberspace and satellite systems
top_signals.summary: In a lengthy joint statement, Moscow and Beijing pledged closer cooperation on satellite internet technologies and joint work on software development and open-source initiatives — part of a broader effort to reduce reliance on Western technology and build a more independent technological ecosystem capable of competing with countries both states consider “unfriendly.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lithuanian lawmakers shelter, Vilnius air traffic suspended due to drone incursion
top_signals.summary: A drone violated Lithuanian airspace on Wednesday, the latest in a series of security incidents in the Baltic region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
top_signals.summary: Confira com Beatriz Reis o que foi destaque da semana no Brasil. Com edição de Patricia Xavier e produção de Gisele Fernandes e Barbara Nascimento.  (Source: Bloomberg)
